name: Judy's Spaghetti Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Pass tomatoes through a food mill.
2. Simmer onion and garlic in oil until translucent.
3. Add sausage and cook until brown, stirring often.
4. Combine sieved tomatoes, sauce, paste (rinse tomato paste cans with a little water to remove residue).
5. Slowly bring mixture to a soft boil.
6. Add bay leaves, basil, oregano, rosemary, parsley, salt, pepper, and wine.
7. Simmer until desired consistency is reached.
8. To make meatballs: mix ground beef with eggs (mixture should be quite wet). Add cheese and bread crumbs; form into meatballs. If moistening hands with water before rolling between palms makes the process easier, do so.
9. Bake meatballs at 350°F on a cookie sheet for 20 minutes.
10. Drain meatballs and add to sauce. Heat through. Enjoy!
